name: Getgigsy
notes: Domain getgigsy.com resolves to Gigsy, a balloon delivery/retail company in NYC. May not be the intended CRM entity — no tech startup matching 'Getgigsy' found. Filled based on what the domain actually points to; treat with caution.

name: Koplovitz
notes: Koplovitz & Co, LLC — advisory firm founded by Kay Koplovitz (founder of USA Network). Located at 660 Madison Ave, New York, NY.

name: Wiserock
notes: Wise Rock produces oil & gas production surveillance software. HQ at 9655 Katy Fwy, Hedwig Village (Houston suburb), TX. Note: primary website appears to be wiserocksoftware.com; wiserock.com domain timed out on direct fetch.

name: Industry Ventures
notes: Leading VC platform managing $7B+ AUM, founded 2000, HQ in San Francisco. Acquired by Goldman Sachs (announced 2025).

name: Orita
notes: AI-powered customer segmentation for email/SMS/direct mail. Founded 2021, headquartered in New York City.

name: Blingcap
notes: Bling Capital — pre-seed/seed VC firm founded by Benjamin Ling. HQ at 4121 Cesar Chavez St, Suite 5, San Francisco, CA 94131.

name: Nuon
notes: All fields already populated in input.

name: Prosperousprocess
notes: Prosperous AI — AI-driven automation for wholesale fuel operations. Founded 2023, headquartered in Denver, CO.

name: Nerdcrawler
notes: Nerd Crawler — online marketplace for original comic art and collectibles. Founded 2022. Location cited as San Francisco by CBInsights.

name: Dayonecap
notes: 日初资本 (Dayone Capital) — Chinese consumer goods VC firm based in Shenzhen, China. Founded 2020 by Allen Chen. $630M fund I closed 2021. Not a US company.

name: Longtail Holdings
notes: Could not identify the specific entity behind longtailholdings.com. Domain did not resolve successfully. Multiple unrelated 'Longtail' companies exist (Longtail Re in Bermuda, Longtail Technologies in Palo Alto, Long Tail Holdings LLC in Delaware). Unable to determine which corresponds to this CRM record.

name: Dynamicgrowth
notes: Dynamic Growth Partners — GTM consulting firm for technical founders, pre-seed through Series C+. Team member Trey Johnson confirmed in Seattle; website does not explicitly state city. SaaS label reflects their focus on software company clients.
